name: Tonight
shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before midnight, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between midnight and 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 62. West wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
